optionsmenu_accessibility_audiodescripti: Turn the audio description on or off.
optionsmenu_accessibility_colourpalette_: Choose between different colour blind accessible palettes to increase readability.
optionsmenu_accessibility_desc: Use this section to adjust accessibility settings such as the display, subtitles, and audio description.
optionsmenu_accessibility_gamepadmode_de: Choose from a range of controller mode presets.
optionsmenu_accessibility_interfacescale: Use the slider to change the sizing of different parts of the Interface, like text and images.
optionsmenu_accessibility_screenflash_de: Toggle whether screen flash effects display during thunderstorms.
optionsmenu_accessibility_screensetup_de: Set up your screen by adjusting the brightness and display area.
optionsmenu_accessibility_textsize_desc: Increase or decrease the size of the on-screen text.
optionsmenu_accessibility_vibrate_desc: Turn controller vibration on or off.
optionsmenu_adapter_desc: Choose which graphics adapter (graphics card) the game uses for graphics processing.
optionsmenu_ao_desc: Ambient occlusion is a technique to simulate soft shadows created by in-world ambient lighting.
optionsmenu_applyprompt_description: Do you want to apply these changes before closing the settings panel?
optionsmenu_audio_adjustsoundeffectambie: Use the slider to increase/decrease the volume of environmental and weather sounds in your parks.
optionsmenu_audio_adjustsoundeffectcoast: Use the slider to increase/decrease the volume of coasters in your parks.
optionsmenu_audio_adjustsoundeffectflatr: Use the slider to increase/decrease the volume of flat rides in your parks.
optionsmenu_audio_adjustsoundeffectvolum: Use the slider to increase/decrease the volume of sound effects.
optionsmenu_audio_adjustsoundeffectwater: Use the slider to increase/decrease the volume of flumes and pools in your parks.
optionsmenu_audio_adjustsoundtrackvolume: Use the slider to increase or decrease the soundtrack volume.
optionsmenu_audio_desc: Choose your volume settings and adjust the levels of different audio elements.
optionsmenu_audio_mastervolume_desc: Use the slider to increase or decrease the master volume.
optionsmenu_audio_mutegamesoundtrack_des: Mute or unmute the game soundtrack.
optionsmenu_audio_mutemenusoundtrack_des: Mute or unmute the menu soundtrack.
optionsmenu_audio_muteparkmusic_desc: Mute or unmute the music playing from your park.
optionsmenu_audio_muteshopradio_desc: Mute or unmute the radio sounds coming from the shops in your park.
optionsmenu_audio_mutesoundeffects_desc: Mute or unmute the sound effects.
optionsmenu_audio_muteuisounds_desc: Mute or unmute sounds triggered by the game's Interface.
optionsmenu_audio_parkmusicvolume_desc: Use the slider to increase or decrease the volume of the music playing from your park.
optionsmenu_audio_playsoundtrackpause_de: Choose whether to play the soundtrack in pause mode.
optionsmenu_audio_playsoundtrackpause_ti: Play Soundtrack in Pause Mode Only
optionsmenu_audio_soundtrackinpause: Play Soundtrack in Pause Mode Only
optionsmenu_audio_voicevolume_desc: Use the slider to increase or decrease the voiceover volume.
optionsmenu_autosaveinterval_description: How often an autosave is created.
optionsmenu_backgroundatmos_desc: Choose how detailed the background will be.
optionsmenu_bloom_desc: Turn bloom on or off.   Bloom is an effect that imitates real-life light scattering and diffusion.
optionsmenu_brightness_details: To adjust the brightness of your screen, move the slider so that the left most logo is barely visible.
optionsmenu_challengedifficulty_desc: Toggle the difficulty of your Challenge park.
optionsmenu_controls_building_edit_comma:
Place Piece
Select Piece
Select Another Building

Cancel Placement
Delete Piece under cursor

Toggle Advanced Move / Rotate / Scale
(Attachments & Decorations)
Snap Attachment / Decoration to Wall Piece Centre
Toggle Align to Surface On / Off
optionsmenu_controls_general_command_07: Cancel Placement, Close Browser, Deselect Object, Open Options Menu
optionsmenu_controls_object_placement_co: Toggle Align to Surface On / Off
Toggle Stick to Surface On / Off
optionsmenu_controls_path_edit_input_07: {#LogicalButton.Editors_PathYJunctionModifier#}, when path preview joins to a path.
optionsmenu_controls_rebind_inprogress_l:
Press and release the button you want to bind.
Reverting in {Value:int} seconds...
optionsmenu_controls_valuerebind_inprogr:
Press the Left or Right Stick or trigger in the direction you wish to bind.
Reverting in {Value:int} seconds...
optionsmenu_controlsglobalverticalgridhi: Buildings and rides are limited to moving in 1 metre vertical height increments. This makes it easier to align buildings, paths, and coaster stations.
optionsmenu_depthoffield_desc: Turn depth of field on or off. When depth of field is on, you will see a sharper backgrounds. When depth of field is off, backgrounds will be blurrier, simulating the foreground focus of a camera.
optionsmenu_device_firstappear_desc: Set when the Park Complexity Meter notification first appears when you're approaching the complexity limit.
optionsmenu_device_reappear_desc: Set how often Park Complexity Meter notifications appear.
optionsmenu_device_remain_desc: Set how the Park Complexity Meter is displayed permanently.
optionsmenu_deviceperformance_desc: Adjust when and how you see the Park Complexity Meter.
optionsmenu_display_desc: Choose on which screen or monitor to display the game.
optionsmenu_displaycomplexitydescr: The Park Complexity Meter increases as you add to your park. You won't be able to add anything else when you hit the complexity limit.
optionsmenu_displaycomplexitydescr_nextg: When the counter reaches the "not backwards compatible section", your park will only open on next-gen consoles and will no longer be able to open on the previous generation consoles.
optionsmenu_effect_desc: Choose the quality of materials on some surfaces. Higher settings increase the fidelity of some effects at a higher performance cost.
optionsmenu_effectpreset_desc: Choose a graphics preset to apply.
optionsmenu_envcapture_desc: Turn dynamic environment map on or off. Dynamic environment mapping creates the illusion of light refractions.
optionsmenu_exitdetails: Quit game and return to the main menu.
optionsmenu_facilitycleanliness_desc: Enable Facility Cleanliness. Hotels and Restaurants will require periodic cleaning after use.
optionsmenu_firsttimeguidancedesc: Toggles whether additional Help Screens are triggered during the Tutorial.
optionsmenu_game_advancedmoveaverage_des: Makes the Advanced Move/Rotate Widget use the average orientation and position of the selected pieces. This can be useful when all objects are aligned and rotated in the same direction as each other.
optionsmenu_game_coastercollision_desc: Turn On to stop coasters being placed through existing scenery or terrain.
optionsmenu_game_coasterfrictioncontrols: Show the Coaster Friction control in the info panel.
optionsmenu_game_coastergoingofftrack: Coaster Going Off Track During Editing
optionsmenu_game_coastergoingofftrack_de: Allows Coasters to go off the track when editing.
optionsmenu_game_coastergoingofftrack_ti: Coaster Going Off Track During Editing
optionsmenu_game_coastersupportsonpaths_:
By default, Coaster Supports do not appear on paths.

If this setting is enabled, Coaster Supports will appear on paths. Supports can still be toggled for individual track pieces in the Track Edit mode, regardless of this setting. 

Guests will walk through Supports that are on a path.
optionsmenu_game_crashtestdummies_desc: Enable or disable crash test dummies for rides that are being tested depending on your preference. This doesn't affect the results of the tests.
optionsmenu_game_distanceunit_desc: Choose which units will be used when distances are displayed.
optionsmenu_game_interchangeablecoasterc: Allows some coaster cars to be interchanged even if they use another track. Can result in visual clipping, changes in car weight and a reduction in track audio specificity.
optionsmenu_game_reputation_desc: Reputation affects the Prestige of your rides over time. The greater a ride's reputation, the more Prestige it will earn.
optionsmenu_game_ridecollision_desc: Turn On to stop rides being placed through existing scenery or terrain.
optionsmenu_game_scenerycollision_desc: Turn On to make rides prevent scenery placement.
optionsmenu_game_speedunit_desc: Choose which units will be used when speeds are displayed.
optionsmenu_game_temperatureunit_desc: Choose which units will be used when temperatures are displayed.
optionsmenu_game_terraincollision_desc: Turn On to stop the ability to manipulate terrain through existing scenery or tracks.
optionsmenu_game_toggleboundingbox_desc: Use the Bounding Box alignment style by default when placing multiple items.
optionsmenu_gameoptions_desc: Adjust a variety of options to improve your park creation experience.
optionsmenu_gamepad_customgamepadremap_d: Adjust the controls to suit you.
optionsmenu_gamepad_invertxfreelook_desc: Invert the X axis in Free Look-style cameras.
optionsmenu_gamepad_invertxorbit_desc: Invert the X axis in Orbit-style cameras.
optionsmenu_gamepad_invertyfreelook_desc: Invert the Y axis in Free Look-style cameras.
optionsmenu_gamepad_invertyorbit_desc: Invert the Y axis in Orbit-style cameras.
optionsmenu_gamepad_leftsticksensitivity: Use the slider to adjust how sensitive the Left Stick will be to movement.
optionsmenu_gamepad_noclip_desc: Turn on No Clip to pass through solid objects when navigating around your park.
optionsmenu_gamepad_rightsticksensitivit: Use the slider to adjust how sensitive the Right Stick will be to movement.
optionsmenu_gamepad_zoomsensitivity_desc: Use the slider to adjust how fast the camera will zoom in or out.
optionsmenu_geometric_desc: Choose the quality of geometrical details on the world and objects.
optionsmenu_globalframeratelockhint: Enable to lock the framerate at 30fps
optionsmenu_globalremovetracklimits_desc: Choose whether to remove the limits on banking and sloping angles for most coasters.
optionsmenu_globalsecurityfeatureshint: Enable Security Features. Some Scenarios require security and will override this setting.
optionsmenu_guestlitter_desc: Choose whether guests can drop litter.
optionsmenu_guestvomit_desc: Choose whether guests vomit if nauseous.
optionsmenu_hdr_brightness_details: Adjust the HDR brightness until the Logo is no longer visible.
optionsmenu_helpdetails: View tips and tricks on how to play.
optionsmenu_interfaceautoscale_tooltip: Disable Interface Autoscale to choose how much the Interface is scaled by yourself.
optionsmenu_interfacescale_tooltip: Scaling above 100% only recommended for use with high resolution displays (1440p / 4K). May cause UI display issues at lower resolutions.
optionsmenu_lensflare_desc: Choose how much lens flare you will see. Lens flares simulate the effect of lights refracting inside camera lens.
optionsmenu_loadprompt_confirmlabel:
Load save '{Name}'?
Unsaved changes to your current park will be lost.
optionsmenu_localparksettingsnotinpark: Setting only applies within a park
optionsmenu_localparkstaffenergyfeatures:
Enable Staff Management Features. Some Scenarios require them and will override this setting.
Changing this setting will not only enable/disable the staff energy system but will also change the values of hiring staff and their wage requirements.
optionsmenu_lpv_desc: Turn global illumination on or off. Global illumination is an effect that allows light to bounce off objects.
optionsmenu_missingdlctosavetooltip:
DLC REQUIRED
You are missing the following DLC required to save this park:
optionsmenu_mouseandkeyboard_custommouse: Adjust the Mouse and Keyboard controls to suit you.
optionsmenu_mouseandkeyboard_desc: Adjust your Mouse and Keyboard settings.
optionsmenu_mouseandkeyboard_keysensitiv: Use the slider to adjust how sensitive the camera will be to keyboard inputs.
optionsmenu_mouseandkeyboard_mousesensit: Use the slider to adjust how sensitive the camera will be to mouse movement.
optionsmenu_multisample_desc: Anti-aliasing produces a smoother overall image and reduces flickering on the edges of objects.
optionsmenu_refreshrate_desc: Choose the maximum frames per second.
optionsmenu_resolution_desc: Choose how many pixels to display.
optionsmenu_ridebreakdowns_desc: Enable Ride Breakdowns. Rides will require maintenance, or will break down.
optionsmenu_safeframe_adjustmentlocation: Adjust the area in which HUD elements will appear.
optionsmenu_safeframe_details: Adjust the slider until the markers are flush with the edges of your screen.
optionsmenu_savemenu_spawnpointwarning: <font color='#FF0000'>Warning: No guest spawn points present</font>
optionsmenu_scaleinfo_description: UI scaling will only be present during gameplay and not in the main menu.
optionsmenu_screenmode_desc: Choose which kind of window you will use.
optionsmenu_sdr_details: To adjust the brightness of your screen, move the slider so that the right most logo appears white.
optionsmenu_search_desc: Use this search tool to find a specific setting fast.
optionsmenu_settingsdetails: Adjust settings related to audio, display, and the game's interface.
optionsmenu_shadows_desc: Choose the level of detail and draw distance of the shadows.
optionsmenu_showadditionalprompts_desc: Show additional button prompts when using mouse and keyboard to assist with menu navigation.
optionsmenu_ssr_desc: Screen space reflections increase the realism of reflective surfaces.
optionsmenu_staffhappiness_desc: Choose whether to enable Staff Morale.
optionsmenu_texture_desc: Choose a level of detail for the textures.
optionsmenu_toiletcleanliness_desc: Enable Toilet Cleanliness. Hotels and Restaurants will require periodic cleaning after use.
optionsmenu_uploadchanges_changenotesdes: Inform other members of the changes you have made to this park.
optionsmenu_visual_heatmapcontrast_desc: Change the colours of the heatmap gradients on coasters and track rides to increase contrast. This affects the on-track colours, as well as the live Data panel and the Heatmaps panel.
optionsmenu_visual_interfacecolour_desc: Choose the main colour of the game's Interface.
optionsmenu_visual_interfacecolour_toolt: Change the colour of the Interface to {Colour}
optionsmenu_visual_onscreencontrols_desc: Choose whether to show controls on the screen as you play.
optionsmenu_visual_showparkboundary_desc: Choose whether to show the park boundary.
optionsmenu_volumeatmos_desc: Choose how detailed the foreground will be.
optionsmenu_water_desc: Choose the quality of the water rendering.
optionsmenu_workshopdetails: Download creations from other creators, or upload your own.
